title: MOSQTO — Mosquito high tone
tldr: Robotron-only VARI preset with very small `LOPER` and `HIPER` — produces a high-pitched buzzing tone, the warning sound when a mosquito enemy approaches.
how: MOSQTO sets both LOPER and HIPER to small values (high fundamental frequency), with a subtle modulator that makes the pitch wobble like an insect's flutter. Same VARI inner loop as SAW; differs only in the preset bytes.
watch: VARI engine view — both LOCNT and HICNT bars are short (high frequency).
Spectrogram — high-pitched fundamental with subtle modulation.
